translations.***另外廣義來說，將人與人或人與事的主動依賴轉化成人對平台、事對平台的依賴也是: ***Broadly speaking, transforming active dependencies between people or between people and tasks into dependencies on platforms by people or tasks is also a form of RPA.***
translations.***基於主動轉被動的理念，原本需要人工上去檢查有無新通知的服務，我們也可以實現: ***Based on the concept of shifting from active to passive, services that originally required manual checking for new notifications can also be automated with RPA to notify us automatically when there are updates.***

translations.***文末有附上完整公開的 Google Sheet & Google Apps: ***At the end of the article, a complete public Google Sheet & Google Apps Script are provided. If you don’t want to follow the steps one by one, you can directly modify the template attached at the end.***
translations.***至此我們已完成自動化查詢、新增資料、填入資料的報表 RPA 功能．🎉🎉🎉*: ***By now, we have completed the RPA functions for automated querying, adding data, and filling in the report. 🎉🎉🎉***
translations.***請注意，我們是從昨天開始往後撈 7 天的數據做比對，不會顯示今天的數據。*: ***Please note, we fetch data from the past 7 days starting from yesterday, excluding today's data.***
translations.***除了節省時間之外，自動的制式化流程也能減少人工出錯機率，提升穩定性。***: ***Besides saving time, automated standardized processes can also reduce human errors and improve stability.***
translations.***首次執行/部署或新增引入的服務、資源，都需要重新跑一次身份授權，授權完之後: ***The first time you run/deploy or add new services/resources, you need to reauthorize. After authorization, all executions will run under your authorized identity, so make sure the account you authorize (usually the current one) has the necessary permissions for those resources or services (e.g., access to the specific Google Sheet).***
translations.**並非需要連結才能操作對應 Google Sheet** ，兩種建立方式都可以: **It is not necessary to link in order to operate the corresponding Google Sheet.** Both creation methods are possible. The difference lies in who owns the Script: if it links to a report, the report owner owns it; if created by yourself, the creator owns it. Ownership matters because if the account is deactivated due to resignation, the script may stop working or be deleted.
translations.**之前所做的 RPA 更多只關注在「動手寫程式實現自動化工作解決單一問題」上*: **Previous RPA work mostly focused on "writing code to automate a single task,"** lacking full preliminary evaluation and analysis, use of No/Low Code tools, compliance, operation monitoring, actual data statistics, continuous improvement, and corporate culture promotion—all essential parts of complete RPA. However, as mentioned earlier, I only recently learned about this professional field, so please allow me to start with a practical implementation article first!
translations.**免費方案如下**\nCloud Functions 針對運算時間資源提供永久:
**The free plan is as follows**  
Cloud Functions offers a permanent free tier for compute time resources, including allocation by GB-seconds and GHz-seconds. Besides 2 million invocations, this free tier provides 400,000 GB-seconds and 200,000 GHz-seconds of compute time, along with 5 GB of internet data transfer per month. The free tier usage is calculated based on the equivalent USD amount of the Level 1 pricing above. Regardless of whether the function runs in a Level 1 and/or Level 2 pricing region, the system allocates the same USD amount to you. However, when deducting free tier usage, the system uses the function execution region’s level (Level 1 or Level 2) as the basis.  
Please note that even if you use the free tier, you must have a valid billing account.
translations.**執行時間上限，腳本必須在 6 分鐘內完成工作，否則會被終止。**\n: **The execution time limit requires the script to complete within 6 minutes; otherwise, it will be terminated.**
translations.**基於安全問題， [無法客製化 Request User-Agent 資訊](: **Due to security reasons, [customizing Request User-Agent information is not allowed](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/36758197){:target="_blank"}**

translations.- CalendarApp Calendar\n\n- DocumentApp:
- CalendarApp Calendar

- DocumentApp Google Drive

- FormApp Google Form

- SpreadsheetApp Google Sheet

- GmailApp Gmail

- [Others…](https://developers.google.com/apps-script/reference/slides/border?hl=zh-tw#getdashstyle){:target="_blank"}
translations.- Convenient, Simple, and Fast\n\n- Comp:
- Convenient, Simple, and Fast

- Completely Free

- Connecting services without complicated Auth authentication  
  (Google Apps Script directly uses the current executing account as the execution identity)

- Built-in Scheduling and Calendar Trigger Features

- Using Google Apps Script to Make Network Requests

- Only use Google Apps Script (based on JavaScript) for development

- No support for package managers or version control features

- **Due to security reasons, [customizing Request User-Agent information is not allowed](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/36758197){:target="_blank"}**

- **The execution time limit requires the script to complete within 6 minutes; otherwise, it will be terminated.**

- For other limits and quotas, please refer to the official [GAS information](https://developers.google.com/apps-script/guides/services/quotas?hl=zh-tw){:target="_blank"}:
translations.- Deployment Required\n\n- Supports mult:
- Deployment Required

- Supports multiple programming languages: Node.js, Python, Java, Go, PHP, Ruby…

- Supports third-party package dependency management, installation, and usage

- Supports full authentication mechanisms

- Maximum execution time limit: 60 minutes

- Pay as you go: Charges based on the number of executions, execution time, different processors, and memory used

- Limited cold start issue (if not called for a long time, the first call will have a longer response time)

- Cannot directly connect to Google services; must go through Auth/API verification

- **The free plan is as follows**  
  Cloud Functions offers a permanent free tier for compute time resources, including allocation by GB-seconds and GHz-seconds. Besides 2 million invocations, this free tier provides 400,000 GB-seconds and 200,000 GHz-seconds of compute time, along with 5 GB of internet data transfer per month. The free tier usage is calculated based on the equivalent USD amount of the Level 1 pricing above. Regardless of whether the function runs in a Level 1 and/or Level 2 pricing region, the system allocates the same USD amount to you. However, when deducting free tier usage, the system uses the function execution region’s level (Level 1 or Level 2) as the basis.  
  Please note that even if you use the free tier, you must have a valid billing account.
translations.- Execution identity: Default is the cur:
- Execution identity: Default is the current account (same as the Google Apps Script user)

- Who can access: Set to "Anyone with the link" so anyone who knows the URL can access, or set to "Organization only" which requires Google sign-in to access.

- Deployment completed, URL obtained.
translations.- If you encounter a Push/Pull Error or: - If you encounter a Push/Pull Error or clicking has no response, please first follow the steps above: "Options" -> Connect to Github or re-verify Google authorization.
translations.- It is recommended to install this Exte: - It is recommended to install this Extension to connect Google Apps Script with git, enabling version control to prevent accidental loss of work.
translations.- No Code: [App Sheet](https://cloud.goo:
- No Code: [App Sheet](https://cloud.google.com/appsheet#pricing){:target="_blank"} (paid service) lets non-developers create service integrations and automation through a GUI.

- Low Code: [Google Apps Script](https://www.google.com/script/start/){:target="_blank"} (free service) enables quick and easy connection of Google services and external/internal systems with simple scripts.

- Function as a Service: [Cloud Functions](https://cloud.google.com/functions?hl=zh_tw){:target="_blank"} (paid service with free tier) allows you to write full code and services, deploy, and run directly on Google Cloud.
translations.- Run when Google Sheet is: opened, edit:
- Run when Google Sheet is: opened, edited, content changed, or form submitted

- Scheduled trigger cycle: execute once every X minutes, X hours, X days, X weeks, or X months

- Trigger on specific date: Execute at YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM

- When Calendar: On Update Trigger
translations.- Select the function you want to run: t:
- Select the function you want to run: the newly added `Main.gs` Function `cronjob`

- Select the deployment to run: Head (meaning the latest version)

- Select Event Source: Time-driven

- Select time-driven trigger type: Day timer

- Selected time period: AM 4:00 — AM 5:00 (GMT+08:00)  
  Usually runs right at AM 4:00.

- Error Notification Settings: Should notifications be sent immediately when the script encounters an error, or summarized once daily?
translations.- Set access to \"Anyone\" because Googl: - Set access to "Anyone" because Google login verification cannot be performed when adding the Calendar.
- X-axis: Task occurrence frequency e.g., 50/Day (50 times per day)

- Y-axis: How much manpower time is needed to complete each task

- Time-consuming Range covers the past 5 years, with the middle of the table showing the labor cost wasted over these 5 years.

- White indicates that the time cost of automation may exceed the benefits, making improvement not worthwhile.

- Green indicates items worth automating

- Red indicates a strong recommendation to automate.

translations.1. Files: \n You can add multiple .gs:
1. Files:  
   You can add multiple .gs files to store different object codes for better organization; all files run under the same namespace and lifecycle, so be careful as duplicate object or variable names may overwrite each other.  
   Besides .gs script files, you can also add .html HTML Template files for rendering Web UI. (This will be introduced later)

2. Database:  
   We can use libraries (a.k.a. Lib) written by others by importing their Script ID. Of course, we can also deploy our own code as a library for others to use.  
   There are also some powerful tools packaged by experts available, but the downside is that you can only find Script IDs through Google search, as there is no official database list for reference.  
   e.g. HTML Parser Tool Cheer.io Script ID: `1ReeQ6WO8kKNxoaA_O0XEQ589cIrRvEBA9qcWpNqdOP17i47u6N9M5Xh0`

3. Service:  
   Google service SDKs that are not included by default can be added here for use.  
   e.g. Google Analytics Data

4. Restore, Next Steps

5. Save or Control + s

6. Run or Control + r  
   If an error occurs, it will be shown directly in the Console and the script will stop.

7. Debugging  
   When the execution reaches a breakpoint (10), it will pause and open the Debug View on the right. You can then continue execution.  
   If an error occurs, the execution will pause and open the Debug View on the right.

8. Debugging and Running Target Method (Function Name)  
   Only methods belonging to the currently selected file can be chosen.

9. View Editor Execution Logs

translations.Google Workspace (舊稱 G Suite)，是我們日常辦公協作的: Google Workspace (formerly G Suite) is our daily office collaboration partner. We use Gmail for email hosting, Google Docs for documents, Google Sheets for reports, Google Forms for surveys, and more. Automating the integration between these services or communication with internal and external systems requires implementing RPA.

Notion Calendar is really hard to use and cannot replace Apple Calendar,  
resulting in having to check both Notion Calendar and Apple Calendar.
translations.Notion 官方也不提供匯出 .ics 行事曆功能，只好用 Google Ap: Notion does not officially provide an export function for .ics calendars, so I had to create my own .ics exporter using Google Apps Script Web App + Notion API, then import them all into Apple Calendar.
translations.RPA (Robotic Process Automation) 中文翻譯為「流: RPA (Robotic Process Automation) translates to "Process Automation Robot" in Chinese. Looking back at human history, from hand gathering to the Stone Age and then to agricultural civilization, from the Industrial Revolution last century to the rise of information technology in the past 20 years, human work efficiency and productivity have grown exponentially. Along this journey, RPA applications have been everywhere: water wheels in agriculture (automating threshing), textile machines in the Industrial Revolution (automating weaving), factory robotic arms (automating assembly), and finally, the focus of this article—automating information-related tasks like automatic report queries and notifications.

translations.```plaintext\nBEGIN:VCALENDAR\nPRODID:-/:
```plaintext
BEGIN:VCALENDAR
PRODID:-//Google Inc//Google Calendar 70.9054//EN
VERSION:2.0
CALSCALE:GREGORIAN
METHOD:PUBLISH
X-WR-CALNAME:NotionCalendar
X-WR-TIMEZONE:Asia/Taipei
BEGIN:VTIMEZONE
TZID:Asia/Taipei
X-LIC-LOCATION:Asia/Taipei
BEGIN:STANDARD
TZOFFSETFROM:+0800
TZOFFSETTO:+0800
TZNAME:CST
DTSTART:19700101T000000
END:STANDARD
END:VTIMEZONE
<?
  for(const eventIndex in events) {
    const event = events[eventIndex];
    ?>
BEGIN:VEVENT
DTSTART:<?=event["start"]?>

DTEND:<?=event["end"]?>

DTSTAMP:<?=event["edit"]?>

UID:<?=event["id"]?>

CREATED:<?=event["create"]?>

LAST-MODIFIED:<?=event["edit"]?>

SEQUENCE:0
STATUS:CONFIRMED
SUMMARY:<?=event["title"]?>

DESCRIPTION:<?=event["description"]?>

TRANSP:OPAQUE
END:VEVENT
<?
  }
?>
END:VCALENDAR
```

translations.之前使用過 Cloud Functions 的案例有：\n\n: Previous cases using Cloud Functions include:
translations.之前使用過 Google Apps Script 的案例有：\n\n: Previous cases using Google Apps Script include:
translations.之前在「 [**2021 Pinkoi Tech Career Talk — 高: Previously, in the "[**2021 Pinkoi Tech Career Talk — Secrets of High-Efficiency Engineering Teams**](../11f6c8568154/)," I shared about the cost of incremental tasks and flow interruptions; assuming a routine repetitive task takes 15 minutes each time and occurs 10 times a week, it wastes nearly 130 hours a year; if you also consider the cost of "flow switching," the total waste could reach nearly 200 hours annually.
translations.之前簡易實現的 Notion to Calendar 功能。\n\n: Previously implemented a simple Notion to Calendar feature.

translations.但 Google 並沒有提供直接的 RPA 服務，可以透過以下幾個服務達成：\n: However, Google does not provide a direct RPA service, but it can be achieved through the following services:

translations.偵錯\n有下 Break point (10) 的地方執行到會暫停中斷並跳出右側:
Debugging  
When the execution reaches a breakpoint (10), it will pause and open the Debug View on the right. You can then continue execution.  
If an error occurs, the execution will pause and open the Debug View on the right.
translations.偵錯、執行的目標方法(Function Name)\n僅能選擇當前選擇的檔案所擁:
Debugging and Running Target Method (Function Name)  
Only methods belonging to the currently selected file can be chosen.
translations.內建排程、行事曆觸發器功能\n: Built-in Scheduling and Calendar Trigger Features
translations.其他限制與配額請參考官方的 [GAS 資訊](https://developer: For other limits and quotas, please refer to the official [GAS information](https://developers.google.com/apps-script/guides/services/quotas?hl=zh-tw){:target="_blank"}:
translations.再來有個次要需求，我們需要建立一個簡單的 Web 呈現每日數據（類似戰情中心的概: Next, there is a secondary requirement: we need to create a simple web page to display daily data (similar to a command center) that will be shown directly on a large screen on the team’s back wall.
translations.再到下一步撰寫程式之前，先補充一些 Google Apps Script 的基礎: Before moving on to the next step of writing the code, let's first cover some basic knowledge of Google Apps Script.
translations.出現「Google hasn’t verified this app」因為我們要: The message "Google hasn’t verified this app" appears because the app we are developing is for personal use only and does not require Google verification.
translations.卡在 Loading… 內容沒出來或出現伺服器錯誤，可以回到編輯器的「執行項目」: If stuck on Loading… with no content or a server error appears, go back to the editor’s "Executions" tab to check the error messages:
translations.取得/建立對應日期的 Sheet\n: Get/Create the Sheet for the Corresponding Date
translations.受限冷啟動問題(太久沒呼叫，再次呼叫，第一次會需要較長響應時間)\n: Limited cold start issue (if not called for a long time, the first call will have a longer response time)
translations.受限於執行時間與 API Request 客製化限制，只有簡單快速的服務我會使用: Due to execution time and API request customization limits, I only use Google Apps Script for simple and quick tasks. For needs involving integration with Google services, I prioritize Google Apps Script (because using Cloud Functions requires implementing the full Google service authentication process).
translations.另外也可以直接從 Google Apps Script 首頁建立 [Google: You can also create a [Google Apps Script](https://www.google.com/script/start/){:target="_blank"} directly from the Google Apps Script homepage, but this will not link it to a Google Sheet.
translations.只能使用 Google Apps Script (基於 JavaScript): Only use Google Apps Script (based on JavaScript) for development
translations.只需在我們要導入自動化的報表上選擇「擴充功能」->「Apps Script」就能: Simply select "Extensions" -> "Apps Script" on the report where you want to implement automation to automatically create a Google Apps Script linked to the Google Sheet report.
translations.可使用以下 Script 搭配 Debug 就能在底下 Console Prin: You can use the following script with Debug to print debug logs in the Console below.
translations.可同步比較 GA 4 後台同樣條件的數據是否相同，如果落差太大可能是有 Filt: You can simultaneously compare the data under the same conditions in the GA4 backend. If the discrepancy is too large, it may be due to missing filter conditions, so please check again.
translations.可邊比照 GA 4 後台篩選條件構建\n: Can be built by referring to GA 4 backend filter conditions
translations.同事每日一到公司就要花大約 30 分鐘左右完成此任務；如果有其他事要處理就需要等: Colleagues spend about 30 minutes every day upon arriving at the office to complete this task; if they have other matters to handle, they must wait until this routine work is finished or delay publishing the daily data report.
translations.同前文，部署成網頁服務，點擊專案右上角「部署」->「新增部署作業」-> 左上角「: As before, deploy as a web service by clicking the project’s top right corner "Deploy" -> "New deployment" -> top left "Select type" -> "Web app":
translations.回到 Google Sheet! 成功! 我們成功的自動新增了該日期的資料。\n: Back to Google Sheet! Success! We have successfully added the data for the specified date automatically.
translations.因文章說明需求，以下程式碼會盡可能少一點抽象，增加說明性，您可依照自己實際的需求: Due to the article's explanation needs, the following code minimizes abstraction to increase clarity. You can modify it according to your actual requirements.
translations.因此我們只需要投入一週開發時間，就能長遠解決負責查數據同事的工作消耗，他就可以把: Therefore, we only need to invest one week of development time to solve the workload of colleagues responsible for data checking in the long run, allowing them to focus on more important tasks.
translations.在編輯器上切換到「觸發條件」頁籤，選擇右下角「新增觸發條件」：\n\n: Switch to the "Triggers" tab in the editor, then click "Add Trigger" at the bottom right:
translations.執行 或 Control + r\n遇到錯誤直接在 Console 提示並終止腳:
Run or Control + r  
If an error occurs, it will be shown directly in the Console and the script will stop.
translations.執行正確回到報表會出現當前新月份，並帶入預設欄位與總計欄位，如果已存在則不會有反: After running successfully, it will return to the report showing the current new month with default columns and total columns filled in. If it already exists, there will be no response.
translations.執行身份：預設為當前帳號(同 Google Apps Script 使用者)\n: Execution identity: Default is the current account (same as the Google Apps Script user)
translations.如果在編輯器上執行時的 Log 或報錯會直接顯示，如果要查訊執行紀錄或自動執行時: When running in the editor, logs or errors will be displayed directly. To check execution records or errors that occur during automatic runs, go to the "Executions" tab.
translations.如果您與您的團隊有自動化工具、流程串接需求，不論是 Slack App 開發、N: If you and your team need automation tools or process integration—whether it's Slack App development, Notion, Asana, Google Sheet, Google Form, GA data, or other integrations—feel free to [**contact me for development**](https://zhgchg.li/contact/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.如果測試沒問題就可以完成正式部署，釋出網址。\n\n: If the test runs smoothly, you can proceed with the official deployment and release the URL.
translations.如果遇到 Push/Pull Error 或點了沒反應，請先按照上面步驟「選項」: If you encounter a Push/Pull Error or clicking has no response, please first follow the steps above: "Options" -> Connect to Github or re-verify Google authorization.
translations.完成以上步驟後的專案檔案目錄如下：\n\n: The project file directory after completing the above steps is as follows:
translations.完成後我們回到「 `Main.gs` 」選擇「debug」並按下偵錯，查看執行結: After finishing, go back to `Main.gs`, select "debug," and click to start debugging. Check if the execution results are correct and if there are any errors.
translations.完成授權後就能成功執行腳本，如果沒有改動資源不需要再重新授權。\n\n: After completing the authorization, the script can run successfully. If no resources are changed, re-authorization is not required.

translations.建立 Google Apps Script、熟悉編輯器\n: Creating Google Apps Script and Getting Familiar with the Editor
translations.建立自動化成本：\n以此案例來說，約需耗費 1 人 x 5天 **= 40 ho:
Automation Cost:  
In this case, it takes about 1 person x 5 days **= 40 hours**
translations.建議安裝此 Extension 讓 Google Apps Script 與 g: It is recommended to install this Extension to connect Google Apps Script with git, enabling version control to prevent accidental loss of work.
translations.心流切換的意思是，當我們專注在重要的事情上做得正 High! 時，需要暫停去處理: Flow switching means the time spent pausing from being fully focused and engaged on an important task to handle other matters, and then returning to re-enter that focused state after finishing them.
translations.我們建立以下多個檔案方便我們存放不同物件\n\n: We create the following multiple files to conveniently store different objects.
translations.我們的目標是使用 Google Apps Script 建立一個 RPA 自動從: Our goal is to use Google Apps Script to build an RPA that automatically fetches daily data from Google Analytics and internal system report APIs, fills it into Google Sheets, and sets up a Web UI Dashboard.
translations.按下「Make Reqeust」取得 Response 結果：\n\n: Click "Make Request" to get the Response result:
translations.按下執行或偵錯取得程式撈取結果：\n\n: Click Run or Debug to get the script retrieval results:
translations.排程週期觸發：每 X 分鐘、X 小時、X 日、X 週、X 月 執行一次\n: Scheduled trigger cycle: execute once every X minutes, X hours, X days, X weeks, or X months
translations.推薦一套免費開源基於瀏覽器的 RPA Tool: [Automa](https:: A recommended free and open-source browser-based RPA tool: [Automa](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/automa/infppggnoaenmfagbfknfkancpbljcca){:target="_blank"} .
translations.提供 RPA 服務的平台有很多，例如 Automation Anywhere,U:
There are many platforms offering RPA services, such as Automation Anywhere, UiPath, Microsoft Power Automate, Blue Prism, as well as Zapier, IFTTT, Automate.io, and more.  
You should choose the service that best fits your actual problem and platform needs.
translations.支援使用多種程式語言撰寫：Node.js, Python, Java, Go,: Supports multiple programming languages: Node.js, Python, Java, Go, PHP, Ruby…
translations.支援第三方套件依賴管理、安裝並使用\n: Support third-party package dependency management, installation, and usage
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.服務：\nGoogle 服務的 SDK，預設沒有引入的服務可以再此追加引入使用。:
Service:  
Google service SDKs that are not included by default can be added here for use.  
e.g. Google Analytics Data
translations.檔案：\n可新增多個 .gs 檔案存放不同物件程式碼，方便整理；所有檔案都會在同:
Files:  
You can add multiple .gs files to store different object codes for better organization; all files run under the same namespace and lifecycle, so be careful as duplicate object or variable names may overwrite each other.  
Besides .gs script files, you can also add .html HTML Template files for rendering Web UI. (This will be introduced later)
translations.此步驟完成時，目錄檔案結構如上圖。\n\n: When this step is completed, the directory file structure will look like the image above.
translations.每年消耗支出：\n1 人 x 30 mins x 365 天(假日數據也要補):
Annual time spent:  
1 person x 30 mins x 365 days (including holidays) **= 182 hours**
translations.無法直接串接 Google 服務，需要走 Auth/API 驗證\n: Cannot directly connect to Google services; must go through Auth/API verification
translations.特定日期觸發：YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM 時執行\n: Trigger on specific date: Execute at YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM
translations.產品團隊需要每日查詢 Google Analytics 數據並填寫到 Googl: The product team needs to check Google Analytics data daily and fill it into a Google Sheet report for trend analysis; the daily data is also published on a Dashboard screen for all members to stay updated.
translations.用多少算多少：依照次數、執行時間、不同處理器、使用的記憶體收費\n: Pay as you go: Charges based on the number of executions, execution time, different processors, and memory used
translations.當 Google Sheet：開啟時、編輯時、內容變更時、提交表單時 執行\n: Run when Google Sheet is: opened, edited, content changed, or form submitted
translations.登入授權後選擇目標資源：\n\n: After logging in and authorizing, select the target resource:
translations.白色為可能投入做自動化的時間成本大於能得到的效益，不值得改善\n: White indicates that the time cost of automation may exceed the benefits, making improvement not worthwhile.
translations.紅色為強烈建議轉為自動化\n: Red indicates a strong recommendation to automate.
translations.終於來到本篇的主題，使用 Google Apps Script 實現 Googl: Finally, we arrive at the main topic of this article: implementing Google service RPA automation using Google Apps Script.
translations.總結來說，Cloud Functions 可以提供較完整與複雜的 RPA 串接功: In summary, Cloud Functions is recommended when you need more complete and complex RPA integrations or have extensive external API connection requirements.
translations.耗費時間 Range 抓 5 年來算，表格中間表示 5 年下來浪費的時間人力成本: Time-consuming Range covers the past 5 years, with the middle of the table showing the labor cost wasted over these 5 years.
translations.腳本完成後，再來只要設定自動觸發條件，就能每日自動完成囉。\n\n: After the script is completed, just set the automatic trigger conditions, and it will run automatically every day.
translations.腳本建立後，我們可以先從上方 Rename 我們的腳本專案名稱。\n\n: After creating the script, we can first rename our script project from the top.
translations.記下 property 底下顯示的數字，即為你要查詢的資源 GA Propert: Note down the number shown under the property; this is the GA Property ID you need to query.
translations.設定排程，每日自動執行\n: Set up a schedule to run automatically every day
translations.設定查詢參數、Filter 條件：\n\n: Set query parameters and filter conditions:
translations.說來慚愧，我也是最近才知道這個名詞，打從從第一份工作開始 (7 年前)，就一直有: To be honest, I only recently learned this term. Since my first job (7 years ago), I have been doing RPA tasks such as writing crawlers for data statistics, automating CI/CD processes, automating data queries, automating stability alerts, automating daily routine operations, and more. However, I used to call it simply "automation." It's time to give it a proper name — RPA (Robotic Process Automation).
translations.誰可以存取要選所有人，因為無法在加 Calendar 時進行 Google 登入: Set access to "Anyone" because Google login verification cannot be done when adding the Calendar.
translations.誰可以存取：設為所有人只要知道網址的人都能存取、也可設為僅組織可存取，會先要求: Who can access: Set to "Anyone with the link" so anyone who knows the URL can access, or set to "Organization only" which requires Google sign-in to access.
translations.調整 `DailyReport.gs` 增加 by 日期新增欄位＆填充資料的邏輯: Modify `DailyReport.gs` to add a new column by date and fill data logic:
translations.調整 `Main.gs` 增加資料串接並在構建階段賦值：\n\n: Modify `Main.gs` to add data integration and assign values during the build phase:
translations.請注意當程式碼有變動時，需要重新部署(網址不會變)，更動才會生效，否則會一直是舊: Please note that when the code changes, you need to redeploy (the URL will not change) for the updates to take effect; otherwise, it will remain the old version.
translations.資料庫：\n別人撰寫好的資料庫 (a.k.a Lib) 我們可以透過他的 Scr:
Database:  
We can use libraries (a.k.a. Lib) written by others by importing their Script ID. Of course, we can also deploy our own code as a library for others to use.  
There are also some powerful tools packaged by experts available, but the downside is that you can only find Script IDs through Google search, as there is no official database list for reference.  
e.g. HTML Parser Tool Cheer.io Script ID: `1ReeQ6WO8kKNxoaA_O0XEQ589cIrRvEBA9qcWpNqdOP17i47u6N9M5Xh0`
translations.跳出帳號選擇 Pop-up 後選擇授權執行的帳號(通常是選當前 Google A: After the account selection pop-up appears, choose the account to authorize execution (usually the current Google Apps Script account):
translations.選取時段：AM 4:00 — AM 5:00 (GMT+08:00)\n通常在:
Selected time period: AM 4:00 — AM 5:00 (GMT+08:00)  
Usually runs right at AM 4:00.
translations.選取時間型觸發條件類型：日計時器\n: Select time-driven trigger type: Day timer
translations.選擇您要執行的功能：剛新增的 `Main.gs` Function `cronj: Select the function you want to run: the newly added `Main.gs` Function `cronjob`
translations.選擇應執行的部署作業：上端 (Head, 意為最新版)\n: Select the deployment to run: Head (meaning the latest version)
translations.部署完成後點擊網址，或回到原網址重新整理即可看到新的更動結果。\n\n: After deployment, click the URL or refresh the original URL to see the updated changes.
translations.部署完成點擊網址即可查看測試結果。\n: After deployment, click the URL to view the test results.
translations.都是與非 Google Workspace 服務整合且須橋接其他外部服務時我會使: I use it mainly when integrating with non-Google Workspace services and when bridging other external services is required.
translations.錯誤通知設定，可設定當腳本執行出錯時如何通知你。\n\n: Error notification settings allow you to configure how you are notified when the script encounters an error.
translations.錯誤通知設定：當腳本發生錯誤時是要馬上通知，還是每日彙整一次\n: Error Notification Settings: Should notifications be sent immediately when the script encounters an error, or summarized once daily?
translations.開發 RPA 的效益評估可參考下圖，只要開發所需時間跟遇到的頻率大於所浪費的時間: The benefits of developing RPA can be evaluated as shown in the figure below. As long as the development time and the frequency of occurrence exceed the time wasted, it is worth investing resources to implement it:
translations.附上一個行銷同事發現的小坑，GA 有些數據會有延遲問題，可能今天查的跟昨天查的數: Here is a small pitfall discovered by a marketing colleague: some GA data may have delays, so the numbers you check today might differ from those checked yesterday (e.g., bounce rate). Therefore, it's best to look back a few days to ensure the data reflects the final values.
translations.隨著 AI 興起，RPA 也經常被提及；但我覺得 RPA 與 AI 並無直接關係: With the rise of AI, RPA is often mentioned; however, I believe RPA and AI are not directly related. **RPA existed long before AI, and the benefits of implementing AI in enterprises may not surpass those of well-established RPA. RPA is more about corporate culture and work habits.** Nonetheless, it’s undeniable that AI can help RPA reach the next level. For example, traditional RPA could only handle precise, routine tasks, but with AI, it can perform more ambiguous, dynamic, and intelligent decision-making tasks.
translations.預設引入 Google 服務的 SDK (不需特別引入即可呼叫使用)：\n\n: By default, Google service SDKs are imported (can be called without special import):

translations.點擊專案右上角「部署」->「測試部署作業」\n\n: Click the project's top right corner "Deploy" -> "Test deployments"
